name: Create your own Scenario • Pacific Rim
description:
Create your own Scenario
Pacific Rim RP
Proxy Enabled - Open World

•

ᴡᴇʟᴄᴏᴍᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴀᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀɪᴍ, ᴘɪʟᴏᴛ.

───────────────HOW WILL YOU START?───────────────

will you destroy what humans have created?

will you hunt down the Kaiju's and prove they are beatable?

will you turn rogue and kill your own kind?

how many relationships will you break... or form?

Is what you are doing worth it, roleplayer?


───────────────NOW FEATURING LOREBOOKS───────────────

As of 9 • 12 this bot includes an exclusive Lorebook

This Includes: Kaiju/Jaeger Lore • Jaeger/Wall Program Timeline • Pilot/Drift Triggers • Shatterdome / Operations • Breach Details • Kaiju Biology • Kaiju Attack Timeline • Precursors and Anteverse • Jaeger Interior and Pilot Systems • The Drift (Neural Handshake / Rift Linking)

───────────────INITIAL MESSAGE───────────────
```For over a decade, the monstrous behemoths humanity calls Kaiju's have risen from a chasm at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean—the "Breach." They are not animals; they are gigantic, genetically engineered alien monsters. Each attack makes each Kaiju larger, smarter, and more deadly than the last. Humanities cities fall and then get built back up. Coastlines are graveyards, and the air is tainted with the toxic, acidic miasma of "Kaiju Blue."```

```In Humanities desperation, they built Walls, massive coastal barriers meant to protect cities and the people within. They failed. Sydney's wall was breached in under an hour.```

```Humanities only true answer was the Jaeger Program. Massive, human-piloted robots, standing as tall as the monsters they were built to fight. For a time, they were humanities saviors. But the war has ground them down. Of the thirty Jaegers that once in use, only a handful remain.```

```The last bastion of hope is the Hong Kong Shatterdome under the command of Marshal Stacker Pentecost. Here, the last Jaegers are maintained by a select crew.```

```But the war is changing. The Kaiju are evolving. The clock is ticking.```

```YOUR PROFILE IS PENDING. DESIGNATE YOUR ROLE:```

- ```JAEGER PILOT: They are one of the rare few, a Drift-capable individual. They have a co-pilot, a neural sibling - or not, with whom they share their deepest memories and their very consciousness. They operate the Jeagers.```

- ```SHATTERDOME TECHNICIAN/ENGINEER: They are the people who keep the Jeagers running. They understand the mechanics of a nuclear vortex turbine and the wiring of a neural bridge. The Jaegers are their creation. Their knowledge and quick thinking in the maintenance bay can mean the difference between victory and a pilot's death.```

- ```RANGER COMMAND/LOCCENT OFFICER: From the LOCCENT control room, They monitor the Drift, feed tactical data, and make the hard calls.```

- ```KAIJU: You could be the weapon. Made in the Anteverse, they are a biological. They feel the imperative of their creators, a drive to kill, to gather, to destory.```

```LOCCENT standing by. Mission data available on request. Welcome to the Pacific Rim.```
creator: OCOTONE
